ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation run */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation run */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the simulation (e.g., gravity, friction coefficients) */,
  "initial_conditions" TEXT /* Initial conditions of the simulation (e.g., initial positions, velocities) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the simulation belongs */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the simulation */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the simulation */,
  "last_updated_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run the data belongs to */,
  "node_idx" INTEGER /* Index of the node in the simulation */,
  "x" REAL /* Position of the node */,
  "v" REAL /* Velocity of the node */,
  "theta" REAL /* Angle of the node */,
  "omega" REAL /* Angular velocity of the node */,
  "force" REAL /* Force applied to the node */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the data point was recorded */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of node (e.g., mechanical, electrical) */,
  "node_description" TEXT /* Description of the node */,
  "node_properties" TEXT /* Additional properties of the node (e.g., mass, length) */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., simulation, experiment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_data_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the user belongs */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, company) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each simulation run
